TextENGNew: ``...@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3088.There it is.``
Eventually, I found a sword while searching through a shelf in the back of the ritual storehouse.
A sword handed down through the Sonozaki family... the ``Tamahajiki sword.``
And that was the crucial key to finding the very thing that I... no, we were searching for.
``Still, it sure took a lot of trouble just finding the key.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3090. And there should be a single scroll showing where the item is stored... but where is it...?``
I wiped away the dust and carefully examined the items stored on the shelf.
Although, it'll be hard to find anything in here with so little light.
(Maybe I should head back to the assembly hall?)
...The moment I said that.
``...Hmm?@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3093. What are you doing back here...?``
I heard footsteps coming from behind and turned back, thinking it was Otobe and the others.
Without a doubt... the person standing there was her.
``...Are you looking for something?@k@vS20/05/VTT_rika3008. Heehee...``
``T-that's right...@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3097. I'm having a little trouble.``
That answer was the best I could squeeze out.
...The more I tried to understand it, the more the shock and bewilderment showed in my face.
``Ehehe... don't make that scary face.@k@vS20/05/VTT_rika3010. I'd like to give you a little help.@k@vS20/05/VTT_rika3011. ...Look here.``
And then.
``She`` rose up, smiling and laughing, as something suddenly rolled out by her feet.
Looking more closely... it was a single old scroll.
That's probably... no, that's definitely what I'm looking for.
I gently picked it up, then looked up to face the girl in front of me. ...The fear I felt a moment ago immediately faded away.
``Thank you, Rika-chan.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3101. You've been a big help.``
And then, ``Rika-chan``...
She smiled as she passed by my side. And then,
``...I'm going ahead.``
``You need to end this quickly.@k@vS20/05/VTT_rika3015. ...There's not much time left.``
Then once I came to my senses, I looked back... but nobody was there.
That scene... It was like a dream.
Then I understood. I knew.
The reason why the girl who died on that day appeared before me...
``...Thank you, Rika-chan.``
Then I held the sword up high to express my gratitude to the empty room.
That moment, it seemed like someone was laughing in the far corners of the darkness...
I could feel it.
